DashboardYour whole operation at a glance.Projects & TasksPlan, assign and deliver creative work.Studio ReviewUpload, comment, approve and request changes.Storage & AssetsFiles, folders, versions and permissions.

Business teamsProjects, people, CRM, reports and invoices.Creative teamsProduction workflows, reviews and approvals.Client workContacts, updates, files and delivery history.Custom workspacesEnable the modules your team needs.

Pricing About
Sign inGet started free
Start

Pricing

Start free. Scale when you need more.

Simple workspace plans for individuals, teams and businesses. Monthly pricing shown. Annual discounts can be added later.

Free

£0 /mo
  • 1 workspace
  • 3 projects
  • 2GB storage
  • Tasks, calendar and storage
  • Basic studio review
  • CORE basic
Start free

Creator

£5.99 /mo
  • 5 workspaces
  • 25GB storage
  • Unlimited projects
  • Studio review
  • Client sharing
  • Priority CORE
Choose Creator

Studio

£14.99 /mo
  • 25 workspaces
  • 250GB storage
  • CRM and client hub
  • Reports and invoices
  • Advanced permissions
  • Automation rules
Choose Studio

Business

£49.99 /mo
  • Unlimited workspaces
  • 2TB storage
  • Invoices, reports and CRM
  • Advanced CORE AI
  • Audit logs
  • API access later
Choose Business

Enterprise

Custom
  • Custom storage
  • Security review
  • Priority onboarding
  • Dedicated support
  • Custom contracts
  • SSO later
Contact
What increases by plan?Storage, workspace limits, permissions, Studio Review, CRM, reports, invoices, AI usage and support.
